channel.title: GitHub F# Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of F# in GitHub

item.title: darklang/dark
item.description:
Darklang main repo, including language, backend, and infra

Darklang

This is the main repo for Darklang, a combined language, editor, and infrastructure to make it easy to build backends and CLIs.

This repo is intended to help Darklang users solve their needs by fixing bugs, expanding features, or otherwise contributing. Darklang is currently source available, not open source, but we are actively pursuing making it open source.

Note that the production version of Darklang, "Darklang-classic", is not in this repo. Since Feb 2023, the Darklang team has been working on a new version of Darklang, which is in this repo -- temporarily, we're referring to this as "dark-next". Dark-next isn't yet ready for production use.

See also:

  • The Discord, where most of our communication happens - join and say hi!
  • Our GitHub Issues, where most work is tracked
  • Our Notion, which we are slowly migrating to Github, generally
  • Darklang-Classic login and repo
  • A guide for contributing to Dark
  • Our guide to the repo for help browsing -- though, it's a bit outdated
